verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah, “Aaron' tapa siampite tungah thu gen in la, amaute lak panin kuamah in ama beh nai pen ahi a nu, a pa, a tapa, a tanu, a sanggampa
ahih kei leh nungak ahi a sanggamnu (tuanu in pasal nei nailo ahih manin amah tawh a kinai ahi hi; tuanu hangin amah kininsak thei ding hi) longal ama mite lakah misite' hangin kininsaklo ding hi
Amah in pasal neisa numei khatpeuh hangin ama mite lakah va kininsakin, tua bangin kidaisaklo ding hi
“Amaute in a lu uh mettol loin, amau' khamul nawlhui zong kiatloin, a ci tung uh liamsaklo ding uh hi

Amaute pen amau' Pasian-a' dingin siangtho ding uh a, amau' Pasian' min daisaklo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in amau' Pasian' anlum ahi, Topa' tungah meihal biakna pia uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute siangtho ding uh hi
Amaute in numei paktat ahih kei leh a kininsaksa numei ten'pihlo ding uh a, a pasal in a maksa numei zong ten'pihlo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh siampipa pen ama Pasian-a' dingin siangtho hi
Amah in note' Pasian' anlum pia ahih manin note in amah na ap ding uh a, amah pen note-a' dingin siangtho ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa ahi keimah, note hong siangtho sakpa, ka siangtho hi
Siampipa khat peuhpeuh' tanu in paktatna tawh amah leh amah a kidaisak leh, ama pa a daisak ahi hi. Tuanu mei tawh kihallum ding hi
“Ama sanggamte lakah siampi lianpen, a lu tungah nilh sathau a kisun'napa, a puante silh dingin a ki-ap khin siampipa in a samte phiahsak loin, a puante zong balkeklo ding hi
Amah in a nu leh a pa nangawn ahi zongin misi khat peuhpeuh kiangah pailoin, amahmah zong kininsaklo ding hi
Biakbuk panin zong paikhia loin, ama Pasian' biakbuk zong daisaklo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ama Pasian-a' ahi ki-apna nilh sathau ama tungah om hi; kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Amah in a zi dingin nungak la ding hi
Meigong numei, a kimasa numei, a kininsaksa numei, numei paktat, hih bangte pawl ten'pihlo ding a, amah in ama mite lak panin nungak khat zi-in la ding hi
Tua pen ama mite lakah a tate a daisak lohna ding ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah a siangthosakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi, ci in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses tungah
“Aaron kiangah hih bangin gen in: Na suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi in a khang khangin ama Pasian' anlum pia dingin hong neh theilo ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh poina a nei, mittaw, khelbai, maihem, leh khutlekhe saulua
khut liam, khe liam
elkul leh mi cingtaaklo, mit hoihlo leh cithak a vei, meima nei leh ciltang kitam mi in hong naihlo ding hi

Siampi Aaron' suanlekhakte sung panin poina a nei mi khatpeuh in Topa-a' ding meihal biakna a pia dingin a nai-ah hong pailo ding hi. Amah in poina nei ahih manin, ama Pasian' anlum pia dingin a nai-ah hong pailo ding hi
Amah in ama Pasian' anlum, a siangthopen leh a siangtho ante ne thei ding hi

Ahih hangin amah in poina nei ahih manin, ka biakbuk a daisak lohna dingin dalna puan gei ahi a, biakna tau nai-ah ahi zongin hong pailo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute a siangtho sakpa pen keimah Topa ka hi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron leh a tapate leh Israel mi khempeuh tungah hih thute a gen hi.
